source_rationale: CD3E is a core T cell receptor complex component, marking this cluster as T cells
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes, indicating a CD8+ T cell identity
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on NK/T cells, particularly NKT and tissue-resident T cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule of activated CD8+ T and NK cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector/memory T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in NK and cytotoxic T cells
CD69 is an early activation marker on T cells, suggesting tissue-resident or activated state
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an NK receptor expressed on NK cells and some CD8+ T cells
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells and NK cells
IL7R marks memory T cells and is important for T cell homeostasis
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein, marking lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
GJA8 (connexin 50) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
Gamma-crystallin S is a lens-specific structural protein
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in lens and retinal progenitor maintenance
ECM1 is highly expressed in lens epithelium and involved in extracellular matrix organization
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells and antigen-presenting cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell marker
CD79A is a B cell receptor signaling component and canonical B cell marker
CD79B is part of the BCR complex and a definitive B cell marker
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in B cells
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B lymphocytes
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed in B cells transitioning to plasma cells
VPREB3 is a pre-B cell receptor component marking B cell lineage
Keratin 3 is a corneal epithelium-specific cytokeratin
Keratin 12 is specifically expressed in corneal epithelial cells

ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor
Desmoplakin is a desmosomal component characteristic of epithelial cells

MAL is expressed in differentiated corneal epithelial cells
LY6D is a surface marker of epithelial cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial cell surface marker important in corneal epithelium
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed in fibroblasts/stromal cells
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/mesenchymal cell marker
Collagen type I alpha 2 is a major extracellular matrix gene of fibroblasts
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal/fibroblast populations
Fibulin 1 is an ECM glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator expressed in mesenchymal/stromal cells
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts
Apolipoprotein D is highly expressed in corneal/ocular stromal fibroblasts
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in mesenchymal/stromal cells

Calbindin marks horizontal cells and some amacrine cells in the retina

PDGFRA marks fibroblast/mesenchymal identity in this activated stromal cluster

COBLL1 is expressed in mesenchymal/stromal cells
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanocyte-specific enzyme in melanin biosynthesis

Tyrosinase-related protein 1 is essential for melanin synthesis in melanocytes
MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte differentiation antigen

Tyrosinase is the rate-limiting enzyme in melanin biosynthesis

PAX3 is a transcription factor regulating melanocyte specification
